text.title: Win-Loss Quarterly PM Template Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules grounding Win-Loss Quarterly PM Template plus the universal skip/run routing pair (referenced by the decision tree).

rule.statement: The quarterly synthesis MUST review ≥15 closed-won and ≥15 closed-lost deals; sub-15 sample sizes MUST defer the report.
rule.rationale: Sub-15 sample produces anecdote-as-trend errors; 15 is the empirical floor where patterns separate from noise.

rule.statement: Synthesis MUST include direct interviews with ≥5 buyers per quarter (won + lost mixed); rep-only data MUST be flagged as unverified.
rule.rationale: Reps systematically over-credit product strengths and under-credit price/process losses; buyer interviews are the only ground truth.

rule.statement: Every loss synthesis MUST name the competitor that won the deal (or 'no decision') and the buyer-stated reason; opaque losses MUST be re-interviewed.
rule.rationale: Opaque losses produce competitor-blindness; named competitors + reasons are the input to positioning revisions.

rule.statement: The report MUST end with 3-7 named actions (owners + due dates); descriptive-only reports MUST be returned for revision.
rule.rationale: Descriptive-only reports are decoration; the named-action requirement is the operational handoff.

rule.statement: CRM stage history MUST be cross-checked against rep narrative; discrepancies > 30% MUST trigger a CRM-hygiene action.
rule.rationale: Rep-narrative drift from CRM stage history is a leading indicator of forecast unreliability; the cross-check is the data-hygiene gate.

rule.statement: If preconditions in `## Applies If` do not ALL hold OR any disqualifier in `## Skip If` fires, the agent MUST skip this methodology and document the skip reason in the cycle artefact.
rule.rationale: A minimum-form decision tree must route 'preconditions-not-satisfied' to skip; this rule is the canonical target.

rule.statement: If preconditions in `## Applies If` ALL hold AND no disqualifier fires, the agent MUST run the methodology end-to-end and produce the artefact specified in 02-output-contract.xml.
rule.rationale: Pair to skip-this-methodology; together they form the always-present minimal route.
